title: How to watch the 2025 Victory in Europe (VE) Day celebrations
body: "The 2025 VE Day events celebrate 80 years since Victory in Europe Day (VE Day), when the Second World War came to an end in Europe. “VE Day 80” events will take place from 5 May 2025 to 8 May 2025, to honour veterans and commemorate the end of the Second World War.  On 5 May 2025, there will be a procession and flypast in London which will be broadcast on national television. This guidance tells you how you can watch the events in London by attending one of the viewing areas around the procession route.  If you wish to watch in person, please read the guidance above so you know how to get to the viewing areas and what to expect. This guidance provides information on accessible viewing and transport options for people with access requirements, and includes a British Sign Language (BSL) guidance video.  There is also a dedicated website with information about other events and plans to mark the 80th anniversaries of Victory in Europe Day (VE Day) and Victory over Japan Day (VJ Day) in 2025. Find out more about VE Day and VJ Day and how to get involved. "
